ideation: This sequence will depict a snowman's shy, almost bashful demeanor.  The animation will start with arms slightly raised, palms facing inward, as if the snowman is self-conscious or unsure of itself.  The arms will then move slightly downward, before returning to a more relaxed, neutral position. This will create a subtle, endearing movement.  The slight downward movement of the arms suggests a moment of hesitation or shyness, before settling into a more comfortable pose.  The overall effect should be charming and expressive.

frames.beat: snowman's arms lift shyly, palms inward
arms lower slightly, a hesitant gesture
arms settle into a relaxed, bashful pose
